description: Protocol defining how agents perform actions, structure action envelopes, handle execution semantics, and report results within the AgentBase ecosystem.
goals: Provide a consistent structure for agent-initiated actions.
Ensure safe, predictable execution semantics across tasks and workflows.
Define how agents validate inputs before execution.
Standardize how results, errors, and side effects are reported.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for the action instance.

input.description: Validated input payload for the task.

context.description: Optional execution context (workflow state, metadata, caller identity).

side_effects.notes: Tasks must be pure functions unless explicitly marked otherwise.

error.description: Error details if the action failed.

usage_notes: Workflows wrap multiple action envelopes into a sequence.
Evaluators may inspect action envelopes for scoring.
Tasks must declare input and output schemas to enable validation.
